subject: A grinning figure runs toward the viewer while a panicking companion flees and dark monstrous shapes loom behind them both
description: A figure with long light hair runs directly toward the viewer in the foreground, grinning widely with an expression of gleeful self-interest. Behind and to the left, a second figure with shorter reddish hair flees in evident panic. In the deep background, two ominous dark silhouettes loom: one wears a spiked or horned helmet or mask, another is a shadowed form. The scene takes place on dark wooden floorboards suggesting a horror-house interior. The light-haired figure's conspicuous smile amid the chaos reads as the egotist of the title — unconcerned with the companion's fate.
foreground: Light-haired figure running and grinning toward viewer in dark interior
background: Panicking figure and two monstrous dark silhouettes behind
emotion: foreground figure: self-satisfied glee; background figure: terror; monster silhouettes: menace
